info.title: TermWatch.CLI
info.description: Terminal-native uptime monitoring CLI. Deploy monitors from YAML, check status from your terminal.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a monitors.yaml template in the current directory

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate monitors.yaml syntax and plan limits

commands.name: login
commands.description: Log in to an existing TermWatch account

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Log out and clear stored credentials

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify your email address with the code sent to your inbox

commands.name: forgot-key
commands.description: Recover your API key via email

commands.name: rotate-key
commands.description: Generate a new API key (invalidates the current one)

commands.name: delete-account
commands.description: Permanently delete your account and all data

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy monitors from monitors.yaml to the cloud

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Validate and show changes without deploying [default: False]

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current status of all monitors

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the monitor to pause

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the monitor to resume

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Show recent check history for a monitor

options.name: --tail
options.description: Number of recent checks to show [default: 10]

arguments.name: monitor-name
arguments.description: Name of the monitor to view logs for

commands.name: billing
commands.description: View plan usage and manage subscription

options.name: --upgrade
options.description: Upgrade to a plan (team or pro)

options.name: --portal
options.description: Open Stripe billing portal to manage subscription [default: False]

commands.name: whoami
commands.description: Show current account and plan info
